description: Site de tier lists de composicoes de TFT (Next.js App Router + Tailwind + Prisma/Postgres). Tier list publica (SSG/ISR) com filtros e badges Novo/Atualizado, paginas de detalhe por comp (traits, carries, itens, board, augments, guia Quando jogar / Como jogar), um Builder de times compartilhado (publico, 'Abrir no Builder' e editor da comp no admin) e painel admin proprio para curadoria por patch. Identidade visual baseada no tftlab.com.br (tema dark slate + acento ciano).

userStories.title: Scaffold do projeto Next.js + Tailwind
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a Next.js App Router (TypeScript) project with Tailwind so that there is a foundation to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: Projeto Next.js (App Router, TypeScript, ESLint) criado com src/app
Tailwind CSS instalado e configurado (globals.css com diretivas base/components/utilities)
Pagina inicial padrao renderiza em http://localhost:3000
Scripts package.json: dev, build, start, lint, typecheck
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Aplicar tema de cores do tftlab.com.br (tokens shadcn)

acceptanceCriteria: globals.css define variaveis CSS HSL: --background 224 71% 4%, --foreground 213 31% 91%, --primary 180 100% 42.5%, --muted/--border 217.2 32.6% 17.5%, --secondary 175 60% 20%, --ring 180 100% 42.5%, --radius 0.5rem
Variaveis de tier definidas: --tier-s, --tier-a, --tier-b, --tier-c, --tier-x
tailwind.config mapeia colors (background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, tier.{s,a,b,c,x}) e backgroundImage brand-gradient (#9333EA->#5EEAD4)
body usa bg-background text-foreground; pagina inicial aparece dark com texto claro

userStories.title: Configurar Prisma + Postgres + PrismaClient singleton
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Prisma wired to Postgres so that models can be persisted.

.env.example com DATABASE_URL
src/server/db.ts exporta PrismaClient singleton (reuso em dev/hot-reload)
npx prisma generate executa sem erro

userStories.title: Schema: modelos de catalogo (Champion, Item, Trait, Augment)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want catalog models so that comps and the builder can reference champions, items, traits and augments.
acceptanceCriteria: Modelos Champion (apiId, name, cost, iconUrl, set), Item (apiId, name, iconUrl, type, set), Trait (apiId, name, iconUrl, set, breakpoints Json), Augment (apiId, name, iconUrl, set, tier?)
Modelo de juncao ChampionTrait (championId, traitId)
Enum ItemType (COMPONENT, COMPLETED, ARTIFACT, RADIANT, EMBLEM, SUPPORT, OTHER)
Unicidade @@unique([apiId, set]) em Champion/Item/Trait/Augment; indices por set
Migration gerada e aplicada com npx prisma migrate dev sem erro
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Schema: modelos Patch e SiteConfig
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Patch and a singleton SiteConfig so that 'current patch/set' is known globally.
acceptanceCriteria: Modelo Patch (version unique, set, releasedAt, createdAt)
Modelo SiteConfig singleton (id default 1, currentSet, currentPatch relation, updatedAt)
Migration gerada e aplicada sem erro
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Schema: modelo Comp + enums + relacao com Patch
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Comp model so that compositions can be stored.
acceptanceCriteria: Enums Tier (S,A,B,C,X), CompStatus (DRAFT,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED), Difficulty (EASY,MEDIUM,HARD), AugmentCategory (ECON,ITEMS,COMBAT)

Modelo Comp com slug unique, name, set, tier, situational, status, playstyle?, difficulty, whenToPlay? (Quando jogar), earlyGame? (Inicio de jogo), midGame? (Meio jogo), lateGame? (Fim de jogo), tips?, augmentPriority AugmentCategory[], timestamps, publishedAt?
Relacoes patchIntroduced (obrigatoria) e patchUpdated (opcional) para Patch
Indices @@index([set, status, tier]) e @@index([status])
Migration gerada e aplicada sem erro
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Schema: tabelas de juncao da Comp
userStories.description: As a developer, I want comp join tables so that traits, units, items, augments and tier history are linked.
acceptanceCriteria: Enum UnitRole (EARLY, CORE, FLEX)
CompTrait (compId, traitId, level, order) com @@unique([compId, traitId])
CompUnit (compId, championId, role, isCarry, carryOrder?, starLevel?, boardRow?, boardCol?, order) com @@unique([compId, boardRow, boardCol])
CompUnitItem (compUnitId, itemId, order) e CompItemPriority (compId, itemId, order)
CompAugment (compId, augmentId, order) e CompTierSnapshot (compId, patchId, tier) com @@unique([compId, patchId])
onDelete: Cascade nos filhos de Comp/CompUnit
Migration gerada e aplicada sem erro
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Schema: modelo User para o admin
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a User model so that the admin can authenticate.

userStories.title: Seed: importar catalogo do Data Dragon (idempotente)
userStories.description: As a curator, I want the champion/item/trait/augment catalog imported so that comps and the builder use real game data.
acceptanceCriteria: src/server/ddragon.ts busca dados do set atual no Data Dragon
prisma/seed.ts faz upsert por apiId+set em Champion/Item/Trait/Augment e popula ChampionTrait
Trait.breakpoints e Champion.cost preenchidos (necessarios ao motor de sinergias e ao builder)
Rodar duas vezes nao duplica registros (idempotente)
npx prisma db seed completa sem erro e tabelas de catalogo ficam com contagem > 0
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Seed: patch atual, SiteConfig e comps de exemplo
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a current patch and sample published comps so that the public UI has data to render and verify.
acceptanceCriteria: Seed cria/atualiza um Patch atual e o SiteConfig (currentSet, currentPatch)

Seed cria ao menos 3 comps PUBLISHED em tiers diferentes, com traits, units (early/core/flex), carry+itens, item priority, augments+augmentPriority, posicoes de board e guia preenchido (whenToPlay + earlyGame/midGame/lateGame)
Ao menos uma comp marcada como introduzida no patch atual (badge Novo) e uma com patchUpdated no patch atual
npx prisma db seed completa sem erro
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Service de badges (Novo/Atualizado) com testes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want badge derivation logic so that comps show correct Novo/Atualizado state.
acceptanceCriteria: src/server/services/badges.ts: isNew = comp.patchIntroducedId === currentPatchId; isUpdated = comp.patchUpdatedId === currentPatchId && !isNew
Funcao retorna { isNew, isUpdated } dado uma comp e o currentPatchId
Testes unitarios cobrindo casos: nova, atualizada, nenhuma, atualizada+nova (precedencia Novo)
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Queries de leitura: tier list e comp por slug

acceptanceCriteria: src/server/queries/tierlist.ts: getPublishedComps(set) retorna comps PUBLISHED do set atual com traits/carries para o card, agrupaveis por tier
src/server/queries/comp.ts: getCompBySlug(slug) retorna a comp publicada com units, itens, augments, board e guia
Consultas usam o PrismaClient singleton e o SiteConfig para set/patch atuais
Drafts/archived nao aparecem nas queries publicas
Typecheck passes
